title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity, particularly as teams scale. The video advocates for TypeScript over Python due to better static type checking, LSP support, and compile-time error detection, which reduce runtime mistakes and friction in collaborative AI development.
